subject: Improve tooltip styling: use info icon instead of question mark
body:
- Change "?" to "i" for all help icons to look like info badges
- Add border, subtle shadow, and italic styling for visual distinction
- Increase margin-left to separate icons from adjacent text
- Update hover effects with enhanced glow and color
- Makes tooltips appear as deliberate help features rather than confused questions
title: Improve tooltip styling: use info icon instead of question mark
